codex_response:
Implemented `e7639916` as: find all `8` cells, take their minimal axis-aligned bounding box, and draw its `1`-colored border while preserving the original `8`s. I used the Opus hint because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for this task, so no `notes.md` was needed. The generator stays on-family by sampling blank grids with exactly three azure singleton markers arranged as one rectangle corner plus one interior point on each opposite side, with small outer margins.
